catalogData.name: Darkness
properties: Unphased (can't gain Frightened or Wounded status)

powers.name: Darkvision
powers.raw: Darkvision (Trait): Spirit suffers no Visibility penalties from dim light or darkness
powers.text: Spirit suffers no Visibility penalties from dim light or darkness

powers.name: Vision Enhancement
powers.raw: Vision Enhancement (Trait): Sprit and you gain Flare Compensation, Low-Light, and Thermographic
powers.text: Sprit and you gain Flare Compensation, Low-Light, and Thermographic

powers.name: Animal Form
powers.raw: Animal Form (Major Action, Sustained): Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.
powers.text: Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.

powers.name: Blind
powers.raw: Blind (Complex Action, Sustained): Cast Remove Sense at Force but must sustain
powers.text: Cast Remove Sense at Force but must sustain

powers.name: Concealment
powers.raw: Concealment (Complex Action, Sustained 10 minutes): (Force) targets gain +Force/3 augmentation bonus to Stealth
powers.text: (Force) targets gain +Force/3 augmentation bonus to Stealth

powers.name: Fear the Dark
powers.raw: Fear the Dark (Complex Action): Cast Spook at Force. Requires dim light or darkness. Can't target same person twice.
powers.text: Cast Spook at Force. Requires dim light or darkness. Can't target same person twice.

powers.name: Primary Spell
powers.raw: Primary Spell (Complex Action, Special): Cast Invisibility (sustained) or Shadow (not sustained) at Force
powers.text: Cast Invisibility (sustained) or Shadow (not sustained) at Force

powers.name: Use Mysticism
powers.raw: Use Mysticism (No Action): Spirit can use Dampen power of Aura Manipulation to hide magical effects
powers.text: Spirit can use Dampen power of Aura Manipulation to hide magical effects

greatFormPowers.name: Sow Chaos
greatFormPowers.raw: Sow Chaos (No Action): Cast Chaos at Force without using action 1/Action Phase
greatFormPowers.text: Cast Chaos at Force without using action 1/Action Phase
